programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.desc: Gon and Killua arrive in a village in East Gorteau but find no trace of the inhabitants.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Knuckle and Shoot are lying in wait for Cheetu. But just as Cheetu is about to approach them, he suddenly changes direction and disappears. Meanwhile, Killua and Gon sense that someone is following them again.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The assassin Ikalgo, an octopus-type Chimera Ant, attacks Killua with his Nen Abilities. Killua captures him and tells Ikalgo that he'll let him live if he divulges his ally's abilities.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Sun
programme.desc: Jotaro and his fellows take camels and travel across the desert, headed for Cairo. Along the way, though, they can't shake the sensation that someone or something is watching their every move.

programme.desc: Kakyoin dreams about being in a strange amusement park, where he encounters the Death tarot card. While in the dream he witnesses Death cut down a dog, but after waking up in terror he can't remember what the nightmare was about.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Death 13, Part 2
programme.desc: Kakyoin tries to convince the others that the baby is a Stand user, but they merely start to doubt his sanity. Unable to persuade his friends, Kakyoin resorts to some extreme measures.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Judgment, Part 1

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Our antiques experts go equestrian in the New Forest. After an encounter with some wild ponies, Christina Trevanion turns farrier while Tim Medhurst buys a horse hoping to gallop after her.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's Tim Medhurst's last chance to get the better of Christina Trevanion. Will a 400-year-old shilling be enough to do it in today's money? Or will Christina's rubies be worth a king's ransom?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw start hunting for treasure in the Sherwood Forest. Can Catherine's cold painted peacock attract higher bids that Paul's porcelain God of Mars?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Auctioneers Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw plus their sporty little roadster, browse around the River Severn. But who'll be victorious at that auction in Newport, Shropshire?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw hit the shops, journeying from Wrexham to the Black Country in their little red sports car. But who'll prosper at the auction in Penkridge?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw take their little roadster to Birmingham. Catherine finds a top-secret hidey-hole and Paul ends up on a canal barge. It's an auction to remember.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Road Trippers Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw browse around Worcestershire. But who will be victorious at the deciding auction? Expect French games and Japanese vases.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts James Braxton and Roo Irvine brave the snow from Northumberland to Edinburgh in their '66 Mustang. But will a lavatorial purchase leave them feeling flush after the auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the second leg of this trip with experts James Braxton and Roo Irvine heading down the west coast from Cumbria to Liverpool. Some weighty buys and a couple of pies.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a tale of two cities for experts James Braxton and Roo Irvine as they scour the shops of Liverpool and Manchester for old treasures. Expect pots, kettles and a spot of culture.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: We meander through the Midlands with James Braxton and Roo Irvine. On the lookout for really old things, they reveal hidden talents and discover scary shops.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The last leg of the trip with experts James Braxton and Roo Irvine, as James joins the circus and Roo faces her biggest fear. Can they find enough treasures to take to the final auction in York?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Old hand Philip Serrell takes novice tripper Louise Gostelow on an antiques hunt around East Anglia. Phil pesters a fisherman while Lou falls for a blue chicken.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Can new expert Louise Gostelow beat veteran road tripper Phillip Serrell at auction? She spends every penny while Phil sees real value in a lady's head and a man's torso.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team find themselves in the middle of a tank firing range in Dorset.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Items in Kent include one of the finest pieces of furniture seen in recent years.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts pay a return visit to Hever Castle.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team of experts visit the University of Birmingham's Great Hall.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team of experts visit Aberystwyth Arts Centre in Wales.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visits Staffordshire to hear previously untold stories of wartime and sacrifice.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team of experts visit the recently reopened Seaton Delaval Hall.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Northern Ireland at Castle Coole near Enniskillen.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Among the items is the first-aid box that Shackleton took on his Antarctic expedition.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce opens a seasonal selection box from the Roadshow team.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head to Hartland Abbey in Devon.

programme.title: Nile
programme.desc: Following the footsteps of explorers Livingstone, Stanley, Burton and Speke, through jungles and swamps into the heart of Africa.

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: A team of explorers set out on a wildlife adventure to the tropical island of Borneo for the elusive clouded leopard and the rare Borneo gibbon.

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: Steve Backshall and his team decide to press on with their ascent of Mount Kuli.

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: A team of explorers venture into the interior of Borneo, with the aim of preserving the area.

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: A team of explorers venture into the interior of Borneo, with the aim of preserving the area.

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: Steve Backshall and his colleagues attempt a daring descent; they go through the sinkhole in the middle of a mountain.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: The riches of the Caribbean and the processes that shape them.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: An exploration of the stunning underwater treasures of the Caribbean Sea, including the world's second largest barrier reef and countless shipwrecks.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: The survival stories of the islands' wildlife residents following the Caribbean hurricane season.

programme.title: Wildlife Specials
programme.desc: An in-depth look into wildlife and nature.

programme.title: Wildlife Specials
programme.desc: An in-depth look into wildlife and nature.

programme.title: Shark: Beyond the Bite
programme.desc: Seven daredevil filmmakers try to capture the ultimate shark shot; see the preparation and planning that goes into achieving incredible footage.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Only one man can swim amongst breaching great white sharks as they hunt.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef
programme.desc: Australia's Great Barrier Reef is one of the natural wonders of the world and the largest living structure on the planet; Monty Halls explores the complexity of the reef itself and the wildlife that lives on it.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef
programme.desc: Only seven percent of the Great Barrier Reef is coral and the remainder is a variety of interconnected habitats including the world's oldest jungle, hundreds of islands, mangrove swamps, deep water gardens, sand flats and sea grass.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef
programme.desc: Creatures travel thousands of miles to visit the reef and Pacific weather patterns are likely to further shape the terrain and wildlife.

programme.title: Terry and Mason's Great Food Trip
programme.desc: Sir Terry Wogan and Mason McQueen arrive in York, the ancient capital of the north.

programme.title: Terry and Mason's Great Food Trip
programme.desc: Terry Wogan and cabbie Mason McQueen pull into the Worcestershire town of Evesham.

programme.title: Terry and Mason's Great Food Trip
programme.desc: Sir Terry Wogan and Mason McQueen make their own pilgrimage to Canterbury in Kent.

programme.title: Terry and Mason's Great Food Trip
programme.desc: Terry and Mason enjoy some top-notch food at one of the country's oldest seaside resorts.

programme.title: Terry and Mason's Great Food Trip
programme.desc: Terry and Mason visit Chester to taste the county's famous Cheshire cheese.

programme.title: Terry and Mason's Great Food Trip
programme.desc: Terry and Mason are in Bristol, rubbing shoulders with some Elizabethan pirates.

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Cake Diaries
programme.desc: Rachel whips up crunchy peanut butter muffins, cardamom yoghurt cake, banoffee blondies and a wheat-free chocolate, rum and almond cake.

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Cake Diaries
programme.desc: Rachel bakes cupcakes.

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Cake Diaries
programme.desc: With a house full of boys who all love sport, Rachel often finds herself baking cakes for hungry lads.

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Cake Diaries
programme.desc: Rachel has some great ideas for birthday cakes with a twist.

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Easy Meals
programme.desc: Rachel sees how local school moms get on with one of her recipes.

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Easy Meals
programme.desc: Provencal beef stew; chocolate croissant bread; butter pudding.

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Easy Meals
programme.desc: Delicious suggestions for the perfect romantic dinner, including spicy squid salad.

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Easy Meals
programme.desc: Rachel takes on the traditional trifle and learns how to smoke her own fish in a biscuit tin.

programme.title: Rachel Allen: All Things Sweet
programme.desc: Chef Rachel Allen is at home in Ireland to indulge her passion for sweet things.

programme.title: Rachel Allen: All Things Sweet
programme.desc: Rachel shows how to treat guests with a selection of tempting snacks.

programme.title: Rachel Allen: All Things Sweet
programme.desc: Chef Rachel Allen gives a master class in desserts that showcase the flavors of fresh fruit.

programme.title: Rachel Allen: All Things Sweet
programme.desc: Chef Rachel Allen creates summer-inspired treats for any time of year.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Road to Mexico
programme.desc: Rick enjoys sitting on the dock of the bay in San Francisco, tasting legendary dishes like the hangtown fry; San Francisco is also the home of sourdough and where America's love affair with seasonal cooking took hold.

programme.title: Rick Stein's French Odyssey
programme.desc: Rick Stein journeys across the channel, following the Atlantic coast down to Bordeaux to sample superb seafood and French regional cuisine.

programme.title: Rick Stein's French Odyssey
programme.desc: Rick explores the banks of the River Garonne aboard a 100-year-old converted barge and savors the delights of French provincial cooking, including magret de canard and petit sale.

programme.title: Rick Stein's French Odyssey
programme.desc: Traveling along the Canal Lateral á la Garonne for plenty to eat.

programme.title: Rick Stein's French Odyssey
programme.desc: Rick Stein tastes the first melon of the season in Quecy; he cooks the famous Gascon dish poule au pot.

programme.title: La impostora
programme.desc: Mariana amenaza a Blanca con revelar la verdad a Eduardo en tres días. Adriano es llevado a la casa de Iván Montenegro. A Eduardo le extraña que Blanca quiera guardar en secreto la boda. Montenegro le exige a Mariana que deje en paz a Blanca.

programme.title: La impostora

programme.title: La impostora

programme.title: El Bronx

programme.title: El Bronx
programme.desc: Carlos tendrá que cargar el peso de conciencia por la muerte de Nina, aun sabiendo que no fue el causante de este hecho. Andrés saca provecho de su talento para beneficiar a su madre y a Juliana. El dinero será lo que garantice libertad de Juliana.

programme.title: El Bronx
programme.desc: Patricia y Lorenzo formalizan su matrimonio gracias a la intervención de Manolo. Luciano logra desviar la investigación que se inició en su contra levantando cargos hacia Fernán Benítez quien ahora tendrá que asumir las consecuencias de sus actos.

programme.title: El Bronx
programme.desc: El director del noticiero dice no involucrarse más en el tema de El Bronx, lo que deja desprotegida Judith. A raíz de una traición, Caracha será el nuevo jefe que lidere la zona de San Bernardo.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Francisco se entera del engaño de Mercedes, quien le pide que vaya a ver a Laura, él se siente acorralado, debe hablar con su hijo y con Valeria. Jorge enfrenta a su padre y lo amenaza.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Francisco dice la verdad a Valeria, ella comprende que sus planes se han venido abajo y da por terminado su compromiso, está inconsolable. Jorge acepta refugiarse en el rancho San Román.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jenny McCarthy joins Jon to help the Thunderbolt Bar & Grill, whose owner is an inexperienced man with poor leadership skills, and his only ally is threatening to withdraw her services.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help two burnout rockers turned bar owners grow up in order to save their business, which is currently losing $100,000 a year.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must get identical twins with identical egos to see eye-to-eye if they are to curb a dangerous over-pouring problem and save RG's Lounge in Kansas City, MO.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon needs the nice-guy owner of Champagne's Cafe, a classic Vegas dive with a storied Mafia history, to start acting like a wise guy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Vegas bar Kerry's was meant as a gift from a grandpa to his family, but the grandkids' mismanagement threatens to squander everything.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is in New Mexico to help Mike, the owner of Lucky 66 Bowl, who is over a million dollars in debt and keeps driving customers and employees out the door with his temper.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon helps the owners of an auto-themed bar tap the brakes on their tempers and hit the gas on getting their liquor license approved by city officials.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is tasked with getting the apathetic owner of Van Goghz to put down her vape pen and start engaging with customers.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The owners of Marley's on the Beach may lose their business and their marriage if Jon can't reverse the financial strain put on them by the failings of their bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is tasked with rescuing a Chicago sports bar that's heavy on managers and light on respect for the owner.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A former psychologist turned bar owner attempts to run a Detroit jazz club, but her interfering family and lazy staff have her seeking counseling from Jon.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: TJ Quills has a troublesome reputation for serving minors, which can only be resolved if Jon is able to convince the owner to give up his frat boy ways.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After losing their father and stepmom, three sisters find themselves unexpectedly owning a bar that they never learned how to run.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon helps Justin and Michael, a pair of strippers who own The End Zone bar in Houston, put aside their differences before they lose more than just their shirts.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Matt is stung by a poisonous fish, he and Mitch find a village where a young woman offers to help them, resulting in all three of them running from her jealous suitor. Logan’s selfish behavior puts his relationship with Caroline in jeopardy.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Kaye is reunited with old flame Wes Masters. Stephanie undergoes surgery for melanoma performed by her doctor and boyfriend Tom, who plans a romantic surprise for her when surgery is over. Caroline catches Logan cheating on her with Neely.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: While in search of underwater treasure, things take a deadly turn when Stephanie and Cody are confronted by a pair of drug smugglers. Back at headquarters, Newman faces off against a different type of treasure hunter…

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Logan decides to write and direct a low-budget action flick at the beach using a drugged shark as the villain, but things get out of hand when the shark Is not properly sedated!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When Mitch Judges the Miss Malibu Beach Bikini Contest, his willpower is tested by two competitors who will do anything to get his vote. Later, Cody designs the "Windjet,” an innovative, new lifesaving boat/waverunner combination.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: CJ befriends Max, a homeless eccentric who claims that he was once a famous Hollywood Costume designer. When Max dies suddenly, CJ learns he was rich and has left her $4 million in his will. Manny joins junior lifeguards.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: At the annual Baywatch Lifeguard Bachelor Auction, Mitch is "bought" for $5,000 by a wealthy socialite. The relationship gets complicated when they get stranded on an island and their social status is reversed. Cody joins a local roller hockey team.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: LA is in the throes of a severe heat wave! Hundreds of thousands of people head to the beach. Lifeguarding gets more chaotic for the team when the Secret Service shows up to inform them that the President is going to go jogging on the beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: To sponsor the Special Olympics at the beach, Mitch hires MTV DJ Jenny McCarthy to throw "Beachblast:" a live televised tournament. After being evicted from his apartment, Cody moves in with CJ and Caroline, creating a surplus of sexual tension.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: CJ's mother, a former Las Vegas showgirl, arrives in town seeking CJ's help to get away from her mobster ex-boyfriend. When CJ and her mom are held hostage on a remote beach, it is up to Mitch and Cody to rescue them.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Australia's Uncle Toby's International Ironman Competition comes to LA. The Baywatch girls think all is fair in sports and convince the guys that they should compete as equals, setting the stage for a series of pranks between the men and women.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Controversy generated by Donna's appearance in Playboy magazine divides the Baywatch lifeguards. When an earthquake triggers a rockslide, burying a bus full of junior lifeguards, Mitch, Samantha, Cody and Donna try to rescue them.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After rescuing a group of fishermen and tourists from a pier fire, Samantha and L.A. fire chief Captain Huntingdon form an elite joint Search and Rescue unit. Meanwhile, Cody asks CJ to paint his portrait, and Mitch receives some strange PI work.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Donna and Caroline work with Heal the Bay after a recent rainstorm washes inland pollutants into the waters off Santa Monica. Mitch falls ill after he unknowing swims over sunken drums of toxic chemicals.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La investigación por el asesinato de un comandante de la Armada lleva al equipo de NCIS hasta la ubicación de E.J. Barrett.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un teniente comandante de la Armada mientras lidia con el esposo devastado. Mientras tanto, Ziva reevalúa su futuro cuando regresa Ray.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se llama al UAC a Salt Lake City, Utah, para investigar un triple asesinato, la búsqueda de una conexión entre las víctimas podría llevarlos hasta un fugitivo que podría estar relacionado con el sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Al encontrar cadáveres congelados flotando en el lago en Nevada, la investigación de UAC los lleva a sospechar que las víctimas formaban parte de una secta que podría estar detrás de las muertes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC está buscando a un asesino serial en Tallahasseeen, que llama a las autoridades para informar de los crímenes antes de cometer un asesinato.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC regresa a sus orígenes cuando miran uno de los viejos casos de Rossi y Gideon para localizar a un asesino que se escapó.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de un hombre que vivía una doble vida con dos familias. Al mismo tiempo, Anthony lucha con la decisión de ayudar a Erin a investigar a su antiguo compañero, a quien ella sospecha de robar dinero de drogas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que el cuñado de Danny, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se enreda con la mafia y roba su tarjeta de crédito, Danny obliga a Jimmy a enfrentarse a los mafiosos con la ayuda de Baez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer se queja de que la NYPD no ha encontrado al asesino de su hijo, Danny reabre el caso. Esto molesta al detective original, Erin, y a Anthony, que lo habían dejado de lado por falta de pruebas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se apresuran a encontrar a una niña desaparecida que morirá en 72 horas sin su medicación para el corazón.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un teniente comandante de la Armada mientras lidia con el esposo devastado. Mientras tanto, Ziva reevalúa su futuro cuando regresa Ray.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs se enfrenta a un arma durante una parada rutinaria para tomar café, lo que lo obliga a cuestionar decisiones pasadas y presentes.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un capitán de la Marina es encontrado muerto con un disfraz inusual debajo de su uniforme, NCIS descubre una sociedad secreta de superhéroes reales y debe rastrear al villano.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un reservista naval de alta seguridad es encontrado muerto. Gibbs colabora con la Dra. Samantha Ryan de PsyOps para descubrir la verdad detrás del posible suicidio. Mientras tanto, DiNozzo discute con contabilidad tras ver el salario de McGee.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: A budding romance between two teammates complicates their future in the game. The challenge forces the competitors to put their brains as well as their brawn to the test.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The power continues to shift in the game, raising the stakes to a new high as the teams brawl it out at the challenge. Old romantic flames reignite between Margaret and Josh.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The rival alliances divide the house as a new power-team emerges. The players have a tough time choking down what Steve is serving up at the challenge. Two best friends face off against each other in an emotional Pit.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The teams hang on for dear life as they fight for victory at the challenge. A wild night of fun leads to chaos when the party gets out of hand. A tough Pit decision threatens to tear friendships apart.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: With the end and the money in sight, tensions are high and friendships are tested as the competitors' plot to stay in the game. It's a hard day on the lake as the teams struggle to pull off a crucial win.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: With the finale just one challenge away, it's down to the wire and one small misstep may cost a team a shot at $100,000. Emotions are high as it all comes down to the last Pit. The final three teams are revealed.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The end has arrived and the strongest have survived. With everything on the line, the final three teams must push themselves harder than ever before as they compete in an epic final race.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: Before bringing their intern Chad to a video shoot with country music star Luke Bryan, the Dudes have to figure out if he can control himself around celebrities.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: The Dudes are invited by NASCAR to drive the pace car at Texas Motor Speedway. Before the race, they get some tips from drivers Dale Earnhardt Jr. and Chase Elliot.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: As the Dudes prepare to shoot a video with NBA All-Star Chris Paul and NFL quarterback Aaron Rodgers, they discover that neither athlete's team has a mascot.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: In order to complete a complicated synchronized stunt for an upcoming video, Tyler needs Garrett and Cody to get in sync at all costs. Tyler wants to take his new brand of beef jerky to the next level.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: The Dudes square off in a suped-up lawnmower racing competition for an upcoming video. When it becomes too difficult for even the Dudes to tell the Twins apart, they decide to help the twins create new unique personalities.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: The Dudes travel to London to shoot a soccer trick shot video with Premier League's Manchester City Football Club. Coby and Cory track down their family lineage.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: The guys learn that Garrett never had a proper bachelor party, so they surprise him with the ultimate DP party night: exclusive access to the Bass Pro Pyramid in Memphis.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: When the Dudes discover that the twins will be teaching a Man School class, they think the twins need a crash course in being men.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: After re-discovering the original basketball that starred in their first Dude Perfect video, the Dudes decide to give it one more shot at video glory.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: After booking a video shoot where they'll be doing a snow battle, Tyler takes it upon himself to get the rest of Dude Perfect cold weather ready.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: When the Dudes want to take the game of H-O-R-S-E to the next level by playing while on horseback, they discover that Garrett isn't a big fan of horses. Cody prepares for impending fatherhood, with the help of his friends.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: Tired of Tyler always guilting them into staying late at the office to play more games, Cody begins the search for a temporary brother.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Papote tiene un bar y emplea a menores que beban cerveza sin alcohol para atraer a más clientes. Por otro lado, Andrea contrató a Yamir, una médium, quien solo la toca con intenciones sexuales.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: El Quijote
programme.desc: Don Quijote lucha contra unos rebaños de ovejas pensando que son ejércitos, detiene una oscura procesión pensando que están poseídas y, más tarde, encuentran una cuerda de cautivos a los que Don Quijote libera.

programme.title: La más grande historia jamás contada
programme.desc: La vida de Jesús en la Palestina ocupada por Roma: su nacimiento en Belén, su infancia en Nazaret, la última cena, la traición de su discípulo Judas, su juicio, crucifixión y posterior resurrección.

programme.title: Jóvenes y bellas
programme.desc: Un grupo de padres decide mandar a sus hijas a un campamento para alejarlas de la música rock, pero ahí ocurre lo que todo progenitor teme: sus pequeñas encuentran novio.

programme.title: El violinista en el tejado
programme.desc: Con una producción de lujo, esta adaptación musical de éxito mundial cuenta la historia de Tevye (Topol), un pobre lechero que, con amor, orgullo y fe, se enfrenta a la opresión de la Rusia zarista de principios de siglo.

programme.title: La loca
programme.desc: Un joven psiquiatra se interesa en el caso de una paciente que cree vivir en el año 1936. Los parientes de ella quieren hacerla pasar por sana para poder cobrar una herencia, pero el médico lucha contra toda la familia para defender a 'La loca'.

programme.title: La marquesa del barrio
programme.desc: Una cantante alcohólica no es sincera con su hija sobre su situación económica y puede ser descubierta con la llegada de su hija de Argentina.

programme.title: De carne y hueso
programme.desc: Una figura del pasado despierta un recuerdo profundo y oscuro, como una historia familiar escrita a sangre fría.

programme.title: Acquitted by Faith
programme.desc: El abogado, Benjamin Stills, está a punto de ser sentenciado a prisión y encuentra fe en Dios después de que una adolescente pierde su vida en un accidente automovilístico por enviar mensajes de texto mientras conducía.

programme.title: El rostro oscuro de la ley
programme.desc: “Del autor de Training Day”, llega este excelente drama sobre policías corruptos, ambientado en los días previos a los disturbios en la ciudad de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Acechada
programme.desc: Una mujer policía recibe un caso en el que descubre que todos los asesinados son antiguos novios.

programme.title: Leones por corderos
programme.desc: Tres historias interrelacionadas: un profesor intenta inspirar a uno de sus alumnos, dos de sus antiguos alumnos se encuentran atrapados en Afganistán, y un senador en Washington tiene una nueva estrategia de guerra.

programme.title: Música del corazón
programme.desc: Nominada para dos premios Óscar, Angela Bassett, Meryl Streep, Cloris Leachman y Gloria Estefan protagonizan esta alentadora historia verdadera de cómo el talento musical de una mujer afecta a las personas más inesperadas.

programme.title: Cesar Chavez
programme.desc: Michael Peña interpreta a César Chávez, que inspiró a millones de estadounidenses a luchar por la justicia social. Su viaje triunfal es un testimonio del poder de un individuo para cambiar el mundo.

programme.title: Como asesinar a una millonaria
programme.desc: Joan Rivers interpreta a la ama de casa de Beverly Hills, Irma Summers, quien está convencida de que su esposo planea matarla.

programme.title: Solteras indisponibles
programme.desc: Tres niñas pequeñas, mejores amigas, conocen a un hechicero que les concede un deseo: tener la misma suerte en el amor. Varios años después, cada una de ellas tiene su propia vida hasta que un día un evento inesperado cambia sus destinos

programme.title: Qué pena tu vida
programme.desc: Un hombre inseguro y con el corazón roto, trata de recuperar a su último amor con la ayuda de su amigo fiel, tomando un camino de malas decisiones que lo llevan a comprenderse a sí mismo y a los demás.

programme.title: Pobres divas
programme.desc: Nora y Mary solo conocen la buena vida en Beverly Hills, pero la fortuna de papá se esfuma. Una tía las toma bajo su protección, pero ella vive del "otro lado de la ciudad". Ríete mientras las princesas se embarcan en la mayor aventura de sus vidas.

programme.title: Complices
programme.desc: Un seductor experto lleva a su sobrino en un viaje a la playa en busca de mujeres calientes. Pero la única mujer capaz de causarle problemas, aparece allí.

programme.title: Labios rojos
programme.desc: Ricardo obtiene una gran promoción, pero la presión por el éxito laboral lo llevará al fracaso en asuntos maritales. Una comedia moderna y conocedora sobre los altibajos del trabajo y el amor.

programme.title: Guerrero americano
programme.desc: Michael Dudikoff es Joe Armstrong, una máquina de pelear que sirve en el Ejército para evitar cumplir condena. Él sera obligado a enfrentarse con la mortífera Orden de la Estrella Negra y con los líderes militares para acabar con la venta ilegal de armas.

programme.title: Código de silencio
programme.desc: Chuck Norris protagoniza este thriller en el que se enfrentan un honesto policía y dos capos del crimen. Henry Silva y Dennis Farina coprotagonizan esta explosiva película entre persecuciones y enfrentamientos de artes marciales.

programme.title: Mcquade, el lobo solitario
programme.desc: Un inconformista guarda forestal de Texas (Chuck Norris) deja las armas por las artes marciales cuando se enfrenta al líder de un grupo de traficantes de armas.

programme.title: Bent: Plan de venganza
programme.desc: En este mordaz thriller policíaco, un policía desacreditado que busca al asesino de su compañero descubre accidentalmente una conspiración gubernamental vinculada al asesinato de una mujer con un coche bomba.

programme.title: Instinto predador
programme.desc: Un cazador (Nicolas Cage) debe luchar por su vida en un barco cuando sus mortíferos animales -entre ellos un raro jaguar blanco- son soltados por un peligroso criminal que quiere matar a todos a bordo.

programme.title: El informante
programme.desc: Moe Diamond, blanqueador de capitales, sufre un accidente automovilístico que lo deja sin memoria, con millones en efectivo, y un grupo de policías corruptos persiguiéndole. Liam Hemsworth protagoniza este oscuro thriller de acción.

programme.title: Mcquade, el lobo solitario
programme.desc: Un inconformista guarda forestal de Texas (Chuck Norris) deja las armas por las artes marciales cuando se enfrenta al líder de un grupo de traficantes de armas.

programme.title: Cómo cortar a tu patán
programme.desc: Amanda, una terapeuta especializada en ayudar a las mujeres a terminar las relaciones destructivas, vive lejos de los hombres y del compromiso. Dedicada al trabajo y la protección de su hermana Natalia.

programme.title: La tierra y la sombra
programme.desc: Alfonso es un viejo campesino que retorna después de 17 años al hogar que abandonó debido a que su único hijo padece de una grave enfermedad. Al llegar a la región descubre que todo lo que alguna vez conoció ya no existe.

programme.title: Orbita Prima
programme.desc: Durante la evacuación de La Tierra, Manuel pierde a su hermano y queda a la deriva. Ahora, debe salvar al planeta para poder volver a verlo.

programme.title: El cuento de las comadrejas
programme.desc: Una actriz de la era dorada del cine argentino comparte una mansión en decadencia con tres hombres: su esposo, un guionista y un director con los que solía trabajar. Pero la llegada de dos jóvenes y la posible venta de la mansión lo cambian todo.

programme.title: Canela
programme.desc: La dueña del restaurante, Tere, ha caído en un estado de depresión tras la trágica muerte de su hija.

programme.title: Cásese quien pueda
programme.desc: Una comedia romántica sobre cómo la boda del siglo salió mal en todas las formas posibles.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: El Perfume: Historia de un asesino
programme.desc: En Francia, en el siglo 18, vivió Jean-Baptiste Grenouille, que nació con un gran sentido del olfato. Pero cuando su don se transforma en obsesión, lucha por crear el perfume más excitante del mundo matando jovencitas para capturar su esencia.

programme.title: Perturbados
programme.desc: Gavin Strick (Nick Stahl) le advierte al recién llegado Steve (James Marsden) sobre el Blue Ribbons, un club de estudiantes robóticos y perfectos que dominan la escuela. Cuando Gavin se vuelve perfecto, Steve y Rachel Wagner (Katie Holmes) investigan.

programme.title: Portadores
programme.desc: Chris Pine protagoniza este intenso y cautivante thriller, Portadores. Es la terrorífica historia de cuatro adolescentes que descubren que son más peligrosos para sí mismos que el virus global mortal del que intentan escapar.

programme.title: El bosque maldito
programme.desc: En una noche, el hijo de Sarah desaparece dentro del bosque detrás de su casa de campo. Cuando regresa, se ve igual, pero su comportamiento se convierte cada vez más inquietante.

programme.title: Sumergidos
programme.desc: En lo que debería ser una misión de rescate rutinaria, el submarino USS Tiger Shark encuentra a tres sobrevivientes del ataque de un submarino. Pronto, los visitantes parecen desencadenar una serie de sucesos escalofriantes y de otro mundo.

programme.title: La reliquia
programme.desc: Entren, si se atreven. La gala inaugural de una nueva exhibición en el museo de historia natural de Chicago está por comenzar. Pero tengan cuidado porque algo aterrador quiere asegurarse de que nadie pueda irse.

programme.title: Freeway
programme.desc: Intentando huir de su vida, la delincuente juvenil adolescente Vanessa Lutz se va a vivir con su abuela. En su camino, conoce a Bob Wolverton, un asesino en serie encantador pero sádico.

programme.title: Pequeña gran vida
programme.desc: Gracias a un descubrimiento científico que permite encoger a los seres humanos, Paul y su esposa deciden hacerse pequeños y vivir en una comunidad miniatura. Paul sabe que algo grande les espera.

programme.title: Un crucero de locura
programme.desc: Un joven comediante en apuros toma un trabajo simple en un crucero, donde espera tener su gran oportunidad para triunfar en el mundo de la comedia en cruceros.

programme.title: Un romántico funeral
programme.desc: Nada como la muerte para ponerle romance a la vida: La suerte de un desafortunado de 25 años cambia cuando es el portador del féretro de alguien que no conoce. David Schwimmer, Gwyneth Paltrow.

programme.title: Sin rumbo
programme.desc: Seth Green, Matthew Lillard y Dax Shepard actúan en esta comedia como amigos de la infancia que se han alejado, pero deben reunirse ante la repentina muerte de su cuarto amigo.

programme.title: Los top five
programme.desc: Escrita, dirigida y protagonizada por Chris Rock, Los top five cuenta la historia de un comediante neoyorquino convertido en estrella de cine, Andre Allen, cuyo inesperado encuentro con una reportera lo obliga a enfrentarse con su carrera de comediante

programme.title: Un Santa no tan santo

programme.title: Cold Case Files

programme.title: Cold Case Files

programme.desc: Un vecino vio cómo un hombre apuñalaba a su esposa, la empujaba a la piscina y le metía la cabeza bajo el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la búsqueda del asesino de dos adolescentes de Texas, un perfil de conducta llevó a sospechar de Jason Massey. La ciencia demostró que el perfil era correcto y Massey fue ejecutado mediante inyección letal el 3 de Abril del 2001.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El mal pie
programme.desc: La policía estaba desconcertada por una huella oscura encontrada en la escena del crimen donde un hombre había sido asesinado y dos adolescentes resultaron gravemente heridas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompecabezas de plástico
programme.desc: Un hombre que iba en bicicleta resultó herido de muerte y la policía creía que había sido víctima de un accidente de atropello y fuga.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven es apuñalada más de 100 veces. El asesino deja atrás el ADN, pero los investigadores deben jugar al gato y al ratón para obtener el ADN de un sospechoso que coincida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una bailarina de gogó le dijo a su familia que necesitaba alejarse por un tiempo, y luego simplemente desapareció. Los investigadores sospecharon, porque ella no se llevó ni su auto ni su ropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1969, la operadora telefónica de 25 años, Diane Maxwell, es violada y asesinada. Su hermano prometió que averiguaría quién fue el responsable y llevaría al asesino ante la justicia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que el sospechoso fuera declarado culpable de incendio premeditado y asesinato, mantuvo su inocencia pero fue sentenciado a 25 años de prisión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se reporta la desaparición de una estudiante universitaria, la policía cree que su investigación será como muchas otras. Pero cuando descubren salpicaduras de sangre en la habitación de su novio, saben que este caso será diferente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1971, John List dejó una nota con los cuerpos de su madre, esposa y tres hijos en el salón de baile de su mansión antes de desaparecer por completo. Los detectives deben resolver el caso, a pesar de tener solo una fotografía desactualizada de List.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba de vacaciones en California, Earl Morris se entera de que su esposa ha desaparecido de su casa en Arizona. La búsqueda de Ruby Morris involucra a decenas de investigadores y científicos – incluyendo también a la Guardia Costera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había sido agredida sexualmente y apuñalada hasta la muerte en la playa. Se descubrió un par de zapatos de tenis de hombre cerca de su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de ser admitido en el hospital con una hemorragia inexplicable, Chad Shelton de 11 meses llega a fallecer. Los investigadores y científicos buscan desesperadamente una causa cuando otros de la misma casa se enferman.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Condena por Huella de Palma de Mano
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre un asesinato se ve favorecida por un requisito legal de que los bares tengan cámaras de video instaladas en las instalaciones. Video, cabello y sangre conducen al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue uno de los casos más inusuales en la historia forense. Los investigadores tuvieron que encontrar una manera de resolver un caso de asesinato con una evidencia que consistía en un tomate aplastado encontrado en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había ingerido una gran cantidad de cianuro. Una pista muy improbable: una falla en el sobre de correo, expuso a un asesino que estaba dispuesto a matar a gente inocente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Ellos pensaron que el incendio cubriría su crimen. Pero una pequeña pista, no más grande que una tachuela, permaneció allí. Contenía toda la información que los investigadores necesitaban para poner a un trío de asesinos a sangre fría tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una bomba casera estalló en una casa rural, la policía no tenía idea de quién era el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las vida cambia después de 20 años de haber transcurrido un crimen sin resolver, y lo mismo ocurre con la medicina forense. Hoy en día, un microscopio de alto poder y el perfil de ADN, revelan una pista que nadie había visto antes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Entre 1985 y 1988, 18 personas fueron asfixiadas, abusadas sexualmente y dadas por muertas en las remotas montañas de California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer muere mientras paseaba a sus perros por el bosque. Como no tenía enemigos y su marido tiene una coartada, la policía asume que fue un accidente de caza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fuego envuelve la casa donde Lori Keidel y sus hermanos se quedaron solos mientras su padre iba a la lavandería. Años después de la desaparición de su madre, Lori le dice a la policía que fue testigo de la muerte de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesinato en el menú
programme.desc: Cuando el jefe de cocina de un restaurante histórico de Filadelfia fue encontrado muerto, los investigadores entrevistaron a los sospechosos habituales: familiares, amigos y compañeros de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1986, Gary Dale Larson fue asesinado a puñaladas en su casa de Edmond, Oklahoma. El asesino agredió sexualmente a la novia de Larson, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Con un pie en el crimen
programme.desc: El cuerpo descompuesto de una mujer joven fue descubierto en un canal de irrigación de Bakersfield. Si había rastros de evidencia, se había lavado con el agua.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven

programme.desc: Political extremists have taken innocent people hostage…and only super-soldiers Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin, and The Delta Force can rescue them in this explosive adventure filled with wall-to-wall action! Martin Balsam and Shelley Winters also star.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Lido di Manhattan, un local italiano con una cocina antiestética y un propietario sin experiencia. Está tan horrorizado que cierra el lugar temporalmente.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay pasa por un restaurante francés y descubre que él y el jefe de cocina tienen una formación culinaria similar. Sin embargo, el chef niega la mala calidad de la comida de su restaurante.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: En este capítulo, Francesco de Sanctis nos lleva a un mercado chino para mostrarnos qué ingredientes de esa cocina podemos fusionar con la elaboración peruana de Tucupi Wontons.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: Francesco nos muestra la leche de tigre del mercado de Surquillo como inspiración para mostrarnos tres leches de tigre diferentes: conchas, jalapeños y langostinos.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: Nuestro chef, Francesco de Sanctis, nos enseña a hacer un arroz con pollo para su familia con todo el estilo de su restaurante Sibaris.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: El chef, Francesco de Sanctis, sale de su cocina en Sibaris para ir a Wingman en Miraflores para mostrarnos cómo hacer alitas al estilo amazónico.

programme.title: Parilla sobre ruedas
programme.desc: Matt Dunigan llega al campo de fútbol en un torneo local de fútbol juvenil. Después de un gambeteo, deja el campo y llega a la parrilla para cocinar costillas picantes ahumadas.

programme.title: Parilla sobre ruedas
programme.desc: Matt y el equipo de Road Grill hacen una barbacoa en la noche en una feria rural de un pueblo pequeño: pita de cordero souvlaki con salsa tzatziki y carne de ternera ahumada.

programme.title: Parilla sobre ruedas
programme.desc: Matt y su equipo de barbacoa llegan a la suave arena bajo el sol de verano y ofrecen a los amantes de la playa una excelente comida que se puede pedir para llevar: vieiras ennegrecidas con salsa de aguacate.

programme.title: Parilla sobre ruedas
programme.desc: Matt, Karrie, Jenna y Charlotte son el equipo Road Grill en un torneo de hockey de pelota para recaudar fondos. Le imprimen emoción y sirven a los jugadores chuletas de cordero a la parrilla.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: El chef Spencer Watts prepara un banquete italiano para cuatro personas, incluyendo unos canelones con queso, un tiramisú rápido y esponjoso.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: ¡Es noche de bar en la cocina de Spencer Watt! ¡Olvídese de salir, las recetas del bar de Spencer son atrevidas en sabor y ligeras para la billetera!

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: En menos de 30 minutos, el chef Spencer Watts prepara cuatro sabrosos, ricos y deliciosos platillos franco-canadienses.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: ¡En solo 30 minutos, el chef Spencer Watts prepara una fiesta con sabores mexicanos para cuatro personas!

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Pasadena, California, para poner en forma un restaurante especializado en cocina caribeña. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Abajo, en Big Easy, el chef Ramsay intenta inyectar algo de vida en un restaurante sureño acosado por una decoración y menús atroces. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay regresa a algunos de los restaurantes para ver si siguieron su consejo. Los restaurantes que visita incluyen Mojito, The Junction y Bazzini. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay regresa a Lido di Manhattan, Anna Vincenzo's y Le Bistro para ver si los propietarios han implementado sus cambios. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Bravos del menú
programme.desc: El chef Christian Bravo visita Mamá Gervasia, en el corazón de Salamanca. Acompáñanos a conocer a Shantall, que dirige este restaurante. Un menú casero digno de un gran Bravo del Menú.

programme.title: Bravos del menú
programme.desc: Acompaña a nuestro chef Christian Bravo al restaurante Pan Comido. Silvana y su madre nos muestran su delicioso condimento. Todas unas Bravas del Menú.

programme.title: Bravos del menú
programme.desc: El chef Christian Bravo visita el restaurante Kunkos, en el distrito de Magdalena del Mar. Conoce con nosotros el sabor casero de este menú, creado por Michael Andrade.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool. Police narrow their search to one man: local policeman Randy Comeaux.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman went missing, friends and family were determined to find her. Their worst fears were confirmed weeks later when her body was discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, David Castor suffered a slow, agonizing death over a period of days. His wife maintained it was suicide, even though it was done with antifreeze.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, a small community in upstate New York was devastated when Patty Wlasiuk died in a truck accident. But burdock seed pods found in her hair and on her clothes indicated that this was no accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the search for the killer of two Texas teenagers, a behavioral profile led to suspect Jason Massey. Hard science proved the profile was correct, and Massey was executed by lethal injection on April 3, 2001.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When hunters reported finding a skull in a Texas canyon, police immediately began an investigation. With a forensic artist's reconstruction, police eventually learned the victim's identity. Now all they had to do was find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this international case of extortion, murder and stolen identities, scam-artist Albert J. Walker assumes the identity of co-worker Ronald Platt. Platt later turns up dead in an ocean with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, Rhoda Nathan was found murdered in a Cincinnati hotel room. When hotel employee Elwood Jones visited the emergency room with an infected hand, which he said was cut on a dumpster, the doctor recognized the injury as something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 10 bodies turn up in Florida, one victim — 17-year-old Lisa McVey — is abducted but released. She leads police to the perpertrator, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When convenience store employee Wanda Mason is found dead, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's security camera. But the image of the killer is so degraded it seems impossible to positively identify him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Avis Banks and her unborn child were brutally murdered. The body was discovered by her fiancé, Keyon Pittman. When police learned that Pittman was having affairs with other women, he became the prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, a federal agency ruled that Terri Strickland had intentionally set the fire that killed her 17-month-old son, Josh Hinson. Using the then-emerging resources of the internet, Strickland undertook her own investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dry cleaner employee is raped and murdered in her store, police turn to forensic science for the answers they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse experiences a variety of flu-like symptoms. None of her doctors are able to discover the cause, until she visits her gynecologist for a routine check-up.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Young Navajos in the Southwest were dying at an alarming rate. The tribe's medicine men provided investigators with a critical clue that would lead halfway around the world to a most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1962, the small town residents of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15-year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, when the wife of a serviceman was brutally murdered in the Philippines, investigators had to reassemble a tiny computer disk that had been cut to pieces in order to find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The crime scene was especially violent: a husband and wife had been shot to death in their bedroom. Was their 16-year-old daughter complicit?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect falls ill and dies just before she is to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy reveals she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators must determine who had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Colorado hunter is the victim of a well-planned crime. Investigators suspect two weapons and two killers. But forensic evidence points them in a different direction — one much closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Bajo la Luna de Otoño
programme.desc: Cuando una ejecutiva convence a su jefe de que un rancho sería perfecto para los retiros de su compañía, él accede a dejarla ir a verlo. Su plan se topa con un imprevisto cuando el dueño se niega a vender a menos que prometa preservar su historia.

programme.title: El partido perfecto

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: It's a new experience for Richie when he becomes romantically attracted to an "older woman.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: For a television show, the Fonz sets a record by jumping his motorcycle over fourteen garbage cans. He ends up crashing into Arnold's chicken stand, and while recuperating from a broken leg, upsets the regimen of the Cunningham household.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork and unsuspecting Mindy hatch a comedy plot that's bigger than both of them when an egg emerges from Mork's navel that grows and grows until it bursts open and out pops their full-grown, middle-aged-looking son.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy is dazed at the reality that she and Mork are the parents of Mearth -half-earthling/half-orkan with the body of a 50-year-old and the mind of an infant and feels lef t out when Mearth accepts Mork as his mommy.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork buys Mearth a fortune in presents to assure his happiness, and when Mindy, fearing a spoiled child, orders that they be returned, their unusual child decides they don't love him anymore.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mearth hates his first day of school on planet Ork so much that Mork and Mindy accompany him back to Ork Prep, where Mork's ancient teacher - who looks like a child - is still sternly in charge.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy

programme.title: Mork & Mindy

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: All of Mork's Earth memory is zapped into thin air by vengeful Orson on Ork when Mork neglects his job of reporting back to his planet because of family responsibilities.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: All that glitters is Mork's gold when the Orkan learns how to make the precious metal from polyester, buys Mindy a 60-room mansion where she can stable her new horse and hires tennis star Tracy Austin as son Mearth's tennis coach.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork is overjoyed that he and Mindy can finally let it all hang out when he meets Kalnik - an alien from Neptune who apparently is also married to an earthling and the four seem to have everything in common.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy lets Mork move into her apartment, much to the dispute of her father.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: When a reporter offers a reward for proof of alien life, Mork decides to turn himself in to pay back the McConnells.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy

programme.title: Happy Days

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: When Fonzie sets a pigeon coop atop the Cunningham garage and the roof caves, Mr. Cunningham sues to collect damages. In Two Angry Men, Laverne and Shirley prevail upon Fonzie to care for a coop of pigeons.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: After reading too many foreign car manuals, Fonzie is plagued with headaches and is forced to wear glasses for a few weeks, but fears glasses aren't cool.

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Mallory arrives unexpectedly at Heartland, which has Amy and Jack questioning the real reason for the surprise visit. Lou is upset to learn that her future plans with Mitch may be in jeopardy.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jake's unexpected arrival prompts Mallory to reveal why she really came to Heartland. Georgie helps Amy with an under-performing cutting horse.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy struggles with the feeling that something is not right with Ty when she and Jack strive to help Ghost, a wild horse linked with Ty's past. Georgie goes on a fun date with Clay's cousin.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A secret from Jack's past threatens to change his relationship with the family forever.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: The family rallies around Amy to support her while Ty is admitted to the hospital after returning from Mongolia. Georgie helps Olivia save her horse from being put down.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: With Caleb and Cassandra's wedding as well as the birth of Amy and Ty's baby on the horizon, everyone is rushing to make sure both events go down without a hitch.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty struggles when his mom makes an unexpected visit in hopes of bonding with her granddaughter.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: The accidental death of Georgie's real parents comes to a head when her brother sends her a newspaper article.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Georgie has a difficult decision to make regarding her equine skills. New parents Amy and Ty try to maintain a social life. Mitch confides in Jack about his move to Calgary.

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: La cuarta temporada llega a su fin con los finalistas trabajando junto a los competidores previamente eliminados para el servicio de cena final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Dieciséis Chefs profesionales compiten por un puesto de Chef ejecutivo en el Borgata Hotel, Casino and Spa en Atlantic City. Los participantes deben sorprender al Chef Ramsay con sus platos originales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después del desastre en la cena de la noche anterior, el Chef Ramsay le presenta a los concursantes la comida que desperdiciaron.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los catorce Chefs restantes visitan una carnicería para aprender sobre varios cortes de carne y luego ponen en práctica sus conocimientos. Hell's Kitchen se convierte en la noche en un asador.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los trece Chefs restantes sirvan el desayuno a cincuenta jóvenes futbolistas y porristas. Sin embargo, un equipo se queda sin huevos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce candidatos restantes compran en un mercado asiático y preparan platos de fusión para el Chef Ramsay y la escritora de cocina Tanya Steel.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los once Chefs restantes cocinan para un bar mitzvah, preparando variaciones gourmet de los tres favoritos del invitado de honor.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los diez cocineros restantes deben hacer tapas con las sobras. Un error de un Chef hace que ambos equipos tengan un casi fracaso.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay desafía los paladares de los equipos en una prueba de sabor a ciegas. En un servicio de cena abarrotado, la ansiedad es mayor de lo normal cuando pasan las celebridades Eric McCormack y Robert Patrick.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El resto de los Chefs deberán preparar un plato a base de cangrejos y cada equipo presentará su plato más fuerte al Chef Ramsay. Durante el servicio de cena, los equipos crean sus propios menús.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay separa a los equipos. Ahora los seis Chefs restantes están solos, cada uno preparando un plato con catorce ingredientes simples.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de un viaje a Atlantic City Borgata, donde el ganador pronto será un gran Chef, los competidores deben preparar un plato original que se servirá en el aclamado hotel.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay cocina para los cuatro Chefs restantes y luego les dice que repitan lo que han preparado. Posteriormente, se planea una propuesta de sorpresa para el menú de postres.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los tres finalistas preparen una comida para 100 de los mejores Chefs de Los Ángeles. El ganador aparece en un programa de televisión, mientras que los perdedores tienen que lavar y planchar la ropa de cama.

programme.desc: Marlow Brozzi, a soccer player from San Marino. A mafia member has proof that Brozzi is cheating so Brozzi approaches Lupin for help.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A toothache prompts Jigen to rush to a clinic in a ruined town. The doctor, Livia, says she'll only take a look at him if he'll let her hold on to his gun, so he has no choice but to hand it over.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine is seen with the members of a failing circus troupe. A former member of the troupe, Tony Belacastro, known as the Magician, died ten years ago, but the secrets to his magic are written in his "Trick Recipes.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: The widow Elena is the only one who knows where her late husband hid his fortune. Zenigata shows up to protect her from Lupin's gang, who are out to steal it from her. Zenigata and Elena go to her mountain retreat to hide from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Nyx, Agent MI6 of the British Secret Service, values his wife and daughters above all others, so he keeps his identity as MI6 a secret from them. However, one of his daughters is kidnapped by some mysterious men.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: An eerie old castle converted to a hotel, known as the "The Mansion of the Cursed Bride," where the ghost of a bride is said to appear. It's said that a priceless treasure rests in the hotel, so Lupin and the gang pay a visit.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Long ago a dictator was assassinated, and the assassins involved were later killed one by one. Goemon was one of those involved in the assassination. A former bodyguard of the assassinated dictator, the legendary sniper Zora, might be out for revenge...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is invited by both Fujiko and Rebecca to a couples-only wine auction party. Both women have their sights on the same thing: The Lovesick Pig, a legendary wine appearing in the auction.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca is kidnapped and Lupin must rescue her! Before she was kidnapped, Rebecca had been deciphering a book left behind by a genius scientist, and MI6 made the mysterious comment that it was the "Dream of Italy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has been arrested and imprisoned. He's tried everything he could to escape, but Zenigata stops him every time. Zenigata then sends Lupin to an even higher-security prison, just to be on the safe side. Has the end of Lupin III has come at last?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is so broke that he doesn't know what he'll eat tomorrow, so he concocts a plan to steal the Mona Lisa. But the Mona Lisa won't be easy to steal. He does his best to weave through the security net Zenigata has set.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Like a she-devil, the diamond "Cleopatra's Soul" is constantly changing owners. In search of the diamond, Lupin arrives at what appears to be an ordinary school...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen, and Goemon decide to go eat some tasty sushi, but when they hop in the car to leave, they find a dog inside. Lupin promises to drop the dog off with Fujiko while they're out getting sushi.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Greco is a man revered as a savior for defeating evildoers one after another. Everyone Greco targets die within 24 hours, killing and being killed by their own comrades. When provoked by Greco, Lupin and the gang head to Greco's church.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A mysterious portrait of Lupin appears at a major fashion show in Milan. When it's determined that the portraits have been painted by Leonardo Da Vinci, Lupin realizes something and rushes to the church where "The Last Supper" is displayed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While shopping with his family, Nyx is shot by someone and loses consciousness. He wakes up bound, and before he is Percival, his boss from his days as MI6.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the car that the famous singer Nora Anita loved and drove for nearly half a century. Zenigata and the police are after him, but they won't make a move for fear of damaging the priceless car. Where is Lupin headed in the treasured car?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While in Italy, Lupin gets a call from someone claiming to have kidnapped Fujiko. The kidnapper blackmails Lupin into stealing a marionette once owned by Gennai Hiraga and now being kept in a mansion in Tokyo.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Declarations of theft show up throughout the city, and they all bear the message "Tonight I'm going to get you, Lupin III," with a lipstick mark underneath. The one who's been distributing the notes is Rebecca.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Da Vinci announces that he is going to unveil his latest work in San Marino. Its title is "World Harmony." After the announcement, for some reason, people all around the Italian Peninsula fall unconscious... and Lupin and the gang are no exception.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca's personality is under Da Vinci's control. In an effort to save her, Lupin delves into her mind, where he struggles with all kinds of traps set by Da Vinci. He manages to find Rebecca's memories, but Da Vinci has overwritten all her memories.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin meets Rebecca to sign divorce papers, before they could finish they are attacked by zombies.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/1987 -A four-run 2nd inning, highlighted by Jose Oquendo's three-run homer was all Danny Cox needed in a crucial Game 7. Cox tossed a shutout in a 6-0 win for the Cardinals over the Giants to send St. Louis to the 1987 World Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/25/87: Greg Gagne, Kirby Puckett, and Tom Brunansky each recorded two hits and Frank Viola struck out seven batters in eight innings to help clinch the Twins' first-ever World Series title over the Cardinals.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/23/88 - The Yankees headed to the bottom of the 9th down 4-3 to the Red Sox. Rickey Henderson helped orchestrate the tying run and give New York hope. Bases loaded and two outs, Claudell Washington scored the winning run on an error by Jody Reed.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/09/1988 -Dave Stewart, Rick Honeycutt and Dennis Eckersley combine to allow just one run on four hits against the Red Sox in an ALCS-clinching win for the A's.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/21/80: Tug McGraw strikes out Willie Wilson on a 1-2 fastball in Game 6 sealing the Phillies' 4-1 win over the Royals, bringing home the franchise's first-ever World Series Championship.

programme.title: MST3K: Doctor Mordrid
programme.desc: Emily's crew watch as the magical DOCTOR MORDRID (1992) defends Earth from the forces of evil, and Dr. Kabahl schemes to increase viewership.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Blood Waters of Dr. Z
programme.desc: Seeking revenge against those responsible for stripping him of his tenure and the denial of human research subjects, Dr. Z mutates himself into a hideous — and murderous — half-human-half-fish-like creature!

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: The second installment of the undersea adventure to Atlantis.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A man learns he was born with special powers and becomes the superhero Puma Man. He fights the villainous Dr. Kobras, who uses an ancient mind-control mask in his attempts to rule the world.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Manhunt In Space
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots watch an early episode of the soap opera behemoth General Hospital, before watching a movie made of several edited television episodes about space pirates.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Jungle Goddess
programme.desc: An heiress stranded in Africa is made queen of the jungle in the feature film and Bela Lugosi stars in the short The Phantom Creeps. Joel and the Bots create their own infomercial.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: Don't leave the house before watching this indispensable guide to hygiene.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Touch of Satan
programme.desc: An aimless young man encounters a rural family that seems to have some secrets.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A prank gone wrong leads to children taking on a dangerous new sport.

programme.title: MST3K: The Christmas Dragon
programme.desc: All three hosts watch a group of precocious orphans attempt save a dying Father Christmas in THE CHRISTMAS DRAGON (2014).

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Violent Years
programme.desc: Jam Handy shows the world the glory of sexism with electric kitchen appliances and Ed Wood analyzes the world of criminals spoiled by their parents.

programme.desc: In the final days before leaving Laguna, Stephen must tie up loose ends, first saying goodbye to Trey, then the surf shop, and finally Kristin. Luckily there's one person he won't have to part with.

programme.title: Laguna Beach
programme.desc: It is a new year with a new cast and the drama starts right away in Laguna Beach. Tessa is invited to queen bee Kyndra's BBQ, but when Tessa brings her best friend Raquel, it's clear they are both unwanted guests.

programme.title: Laguna Beach
programme.desc: Rocky throws Tessa a surprise birthday party but it's Chase who delivers Tessa the best present. Meanwhile, the Kyndra/Cameron relationship heats up behind Jessica's back.

programme.title: Laguna Beach
programme.desc: Christmas in Laguna heats up when Kyndra and Cami crash Rocky's holiday party. Meanwhile, Cameron gets defensive about his relationship with Jessica.

programme.title: Girl Code
programme.desc: Girl Code" discusses boners, that awkward phase when you go through puberty, and the higher power of religion. Plus, fan questions about how to give a friend a makeover tactfully and the signs that a guy likes you are answered.

programme.title: Girl Code

programme.title: Disaster Date
programme.desc: Ashley loses patience when her blind date can't pay any attention to her, Adam's brother hooks him up with an inappropriate yoga instructor, and Calvin goes out with a girl who should be called Ms Hair Everywhere.

programme.title: Disaster Date

programme.title: FriendZone
programme.desc: Kris tries to woo his best friend Lauren with a special love song. Rachel musters the courage to tell Billy how she really feels.

programme.title: FriendZone

programme.title: Are You The One?
